name: places.json 데이터 무결성
description: places.json의 모든 항목이 필수 필드를 갖추고 있는지 검증

steps.command: node -e "const d=require('./data/places.json'); const missing=d.filter(p=>!p.slug||!p.name||!p.lat||!p.lng); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing fields:',missing.map(p=>p.slug||'unknown'));process.exit(1)} console.log('All',d.length,'places have required fields')"
steps.desc: 필수 필드 (slug, name, lat, lng) 존재

steps.command: node -e "const d=require('./data/places.json'); const prev=21; if(d.length<prev){console.error('Place count decreased:',d.length,'<',prev);process.exit(1)} console.log('Place count OK:',d.length)"
